description: Official technical lane plugin manifest (vendor-neutral, provider-instance-backed): the node reads its explicit providerInstanceRef, and the runtime provider layer resolves the instance and invokes the trusted registered technical adapter, which computes indicator features (EMA/RSI/ATR-style) over the market candles for the validated signal. The node contains no vendor logic; deterministic given the selected instance's inputs.

candleLimit.description: Number of candles fetched from the price feed for indicator computation.
